flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Beal University rose 37% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.3k → $19.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Beal University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (46.1% → 36.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 12 pp at Beal University vs the 2019–2022 baseline (34.2% vs 45.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Beal University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).
